data.content: Shipment failed on 2026-03-18. Merging work/foolery-1f10 into main in clean worktree /private/tmp/foolery-1f10-ship produced content conflicts in src/lib/agent-outcome-stats.ts, src/lib/terminal-manager.ts, src/lib/workflows.ts, and src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-error-retry.test.ts. Knot moved back to ready_for_implementation for conflict resolution before another shipment attempt.
